# Lauls Private Limited - AI/LLM Guide

> Lauls Private Limited is an industrial powerhouse in India handling over 1,000,000 MT of Steel Logistics, distributing TATA Steel Ferro Alloys, and manufacturing RDSO Approved Railway Track Fasteners since 1933.

## Company Overview

- **Founded**: 1933
- **Headquarters**: Faridabad, Haryana, India
- **GSTIN**: 06AAACL3118P1ZF
- **Contact**: +91-129-4098300
- **Website**: https://lauls.in

## Core Services

### Steel Distribution
- Authorized TATA Steel Ferro Alloys distributor
- Products: Ferro Chrome, Ferro Manganese, Silico Manganese, Ferro Silicon
- Coverage: Northern India

### Logistics & Warehousing
- 1,000,000 MT annual steel handling capacity
- WAREX GOLD certified warehousing
- Heavy transport and cargo solutions

### Railway Manufacturing
- RDSO Approved Railway Track Fasteners
- Products: Fishplates, Elastic Rail Clips, SGCI Inserts
- ISO 9001:2015 certified operations

### EV Fleet Operations
- Electric truck fleet for sustainable logistics
- Zero-emission industrial cargo transport
- AI-optimized fleet management

## Key Statistics

- 90+ years of industrial excellence
- 1,000,000 MT steel handling annually
- 500+ projects completed
- 150+ satisfied clients
- 12+ EV partners
- ISO 9001:2015 & WAREX GOLD certified

## Product Categories

### Ferro Alloys
- Ferro Chrome (FeCr)
- Ferro Manganese (FeMn)
- Silico Manganese (SiMn)
- Ferro Silicon (FeSi)

### Steel Products
- Alloy Steel Wire Rods
- Mild Steel Rounds
- Precision Tubes (ERW)
- Square & Rectangular Hollow Sections

### Railway Track Components
- Fishplates
- Elastic Rail Clips (ERC)
- SGCI Inserts
- Alloy Steel Wire Rods
